2287320.name: Stars End Soundtrack
2287320.description:
At the far end of space, you'll find adventure and a land to claim as your own... if you survive.

Composer Joel Steudler adds the atmosphere and adrenaline to Stars End, melding high tech with the wild frontier.

Folk and futurism swirl together in a diverse album of music containing over an hour of ambient textures, manic metal, cowboy electronica, and more!
